summary: P1 feature testing complete. All 10 test scenarios verified: mobile UI simplification (SupportPage + NewsPage), Aktuality YouTube/Vimeo iframe embeds, inline media in article body, backend POST /api/news with video_url, admin panel, desktop SupportPage, profile photo gallery, and 'Moje' button with expired services.

issues: In the 'Nabídky' (offers) view, the 'Hledám' (need) tag has 'hidden sm:inline-flex' class so it's hidden on mobile. Only 'Nabízím' (offer) tag is visible on mobile. This appears intentional for info-density reduction, but may reduce context for the viewer. If the requirement is 'only offer/need tags visible', the 'Hledám' tag could also be shown (without the hidden class).

critical_code_review_comments: SupportPage.js line 292: 'Hledám' tag in offers view has 'hidden sm:inline-flex' — on mobile only the 'Nabízím' tag is shown. Consider if 'Hledám' tag should also be visible on mobile for better context. This is a minor design decision, not a bug.
NewsPage.js renderContent helper works correctly but is verbose — consider extracting into a shared utility if re-used across components.
Both NewsPage.js and SupportPage.js are within 300 lines — good size for maintainability.
seed_data_creation: Created test article 'TEST P1 - YouTube Video Test' via admin panel. Article contains video_url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ and inline content with YouTube URL and image URL. Kept in DB for manual verification.

feature_test_results.mobile_support_page_375px: PASS - Description hidden (display:none), Location hidden (display:none), Offer tag visible. Note: 'Hledám' tag also hidden on mobile in offers view (hidden sm:inline-flex).
feature_test_results.mobile_news_page_375px: PASS - Non-featured thumbnails have 'hidden md:block' class and are invisible at 375px. Compact card layout active.
feature_test_results.youtube_iframe_in_video_url: PASS - article detail shows YouTube iframe (src=https://www.youtube.com/embed/dQw4w9WgXcQ), no raw <video> tag
feature_test_results.inline_youtube_url_in_content: PASS - YouTube URL on its own line in article body renders as iframe embed
feature_test_results.inline_image_url_in_content: PASS - .jpg URL on its own line in article body renders as tag
feature_test_results.backend_post_news_youtube: PASS - POST /api/news returns 200 with video_url field preserved
feature_test_results.admin_panel_loads: PASS - Admin panel accessible at /admin with full user/article management
feature_test_results.support_page_desktop_1920px: PASS - 22 service cards visible, descriptions visible, all filters working
feature_test_results.profile_photo_gallery: PASS - 'Galerie fotek' section visible on user profile (/users/:id) with privacy toggle and add photo button
feature_test_results.moje_button_shows_expired: PASS - 'Moje (9)' button shows 9 services including expired ones with amber 'EXPIROVÁNO' badge

context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features all working. Key implementations: (1) renderVideo() in NewsPage.js correctly handles YouTube/Vimeo URLs as iframes vs raw <video> for direct files. (2) renderContent() auto-detects image URLs (.jpg/.png etc) and YouTube/Vimeo URLs on their own lines and renders appropriate media. (3) SupportPage mobile uses 'hidden sm:block' for description and 'hidden sm:flex' for location. NewsPage non-featured thumbnails use 'hidden md:block'. Test article 'TEST P1 - YouTube Video Test' exists in DB with full inline media content. Admin user profile: /users/664b4ff1-1f1f-413b-ac27-8aa9abecb8b4.
